title: cajanus scarabaeoides
intro: Cajanus scarabaeoides, also known as the Pigeonwheat or Pigeon Pea, is a legume plant native to India and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cajanus scarabaeoides include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, among others. In herbal preparations, the seeds and leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to provide relief from various health conditions.
